headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms — ideal day to drive the 'no ground truth' evals design doc forward before the next bi-weekly TR.

must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, no due date set yet, and evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Agents Big Rock TR; zero-meeting day is the best window to write

must_make_progress.why: Ensures the no-ground-truth design ties cleanly into the broader evals narrative and upcoming demos

Check if DeepRAG/BatchTransform pattern updates have any dependency on the no-ground-truth eval framework

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to retrieve

evals_adoption.vs_goal: Key 26.4 deliverable; need telemetry to track

flags: Salesforce auth is broken (INVALID_LOGIN) — customer escalation visibility is zero until fixed.
Snowflake credentials are empty — no product telemetry or funnel metrics available; the bi-weekly TR depends on these.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of it silently slipping; consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the TR — monitor for downstream impact on evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations visible and no meetings — net-new impact today depends on unblocking the data integrations and advancing the evals design doc that underpins a core 26.4 deliverable.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unavailable due to broken Snowflake auth; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work today.

slack_summary: Clear calendar today — best use of time is pushing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) forward since evals is a key 26.4 deliverable. Urgent housekeeping: Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are both broken, cutting off escalation visibility and product telemetry — flag to IT/DevOps. Zero meetings today.
